SettingsDrawer.title: Settings
SettingsDrawer.subtitle: Global interaction preferences
SettingsDrawer.interactionHint: Set the overall response rhythm and relationship distance.
SettingsDrawer.voiceHint: Voice replies stay automatic unless you pin a manual voice in Inspect.
SettingsDrawer.enableVoiceHint: Allow local-chat to answer with spoken beats when voice fits the moment.
SettingsDrawer.autoPlayVoiceRepliesHint: Automatically play voice beats after they arrive.
SettingsDrawer.voiceAutoMatchHint: Voice is auto-matched from the character profile. Use Inspect only when you need a manual override.
SettingsDrawer.mediaHint: Control whether images and videos appear in conversation, and their content style.
SettingsDrawer.presenceHint: Decide whether the character can reach out on its own.
SettingsDrawer.allowProactiveContactHint: Let the character send gentle check-ins when the relationship supports it.
SettingsDrawer.developerToolsHint: Expand only when you need Inspect, routes, or diagnostics.
SettingsDrawer.developerToolsBody: Inspect shows runtime, route, and model details. It is not part of the normal chat path.

ChatRoute.title: Chat Model Config
ChatRoute.storedNote: Stored in local-chat mod, not global AI Runtime.
ChatRoute.noModels: No available chat model for current source.

MediaRoute.title: Media Route Config
MediaRoute.connectorRequiredHint: Cloud is selected but connector is not configured, media generation will fail.
MediaRoute.autoCapability: Auto mode has no media overrides. If generation fails, configure connector/model manually.

VoicePanel.title: Voice Model Config
VoicePanel.enabledNote: Voice replies and voice input are enabled. Voice list is scoped to the selected route and model.
VoicePanel.disabledNote: Voice is disabled. Local-Chat will not run TTS, STT, or voice catalog queries until you enable it.
VoicePanel.noModels: No available model for current connector.
VoicePanel.noVoices: No available voices for the current route and model.

Header.title: Local Chat
Header.subtitle: Agent friends only
Header.noBio: This Agent has no public bio.

RightSidebar.inspectCrashedBody: Only the developer sidebar failed this time. The main chat can still continue normally.

MessagePane.emptyDescTarget: Talking to {{name}} with chat route model {{model}}
MessagePane.emptyDescNoTarget: Add an Agent friend in Contacts to start chatting
MessagePane.welcomeDescription: Start with a greeting, or jump straight into what you want to talk about. Replies will unfold in a {{deliveryStyle}} rhythm.
MessagePane.historyIntro: Your earlier conversation is still here. The next reply will continue on this thread.
MessagePane.runtimeInlinePending: Local runtime is still warming up. You can send now; it will catch up naturally once ready.
MessagePane.voiceRecording: Recording... click again to stop and transcribe.
MessagePane.voiceFailed: Voice transcription failed. Check STT route and retry.
MessagePane.stageHint: The current turn plays here first, while history stays below.
MessagePane.stageNoReply: The next in-character reply will land here first.
MessagePane.quickImagePrompt: Send me an image that fits what we are talking about.
MessagePane.quickVideoPrompt: Send me a short video that fits what we are talking about.

TargetPane.title: Local Chat
TargetPane.subtitle: Agent friends only
TargetPane.heroTitle: They are all here waiting for you
TargetPane.heroDescription: Behind every bubble is a conversation waiting to continue.
TargetPane.noResultsTitle: The space is quiet for now
TargetPane.bioFallback: No bio yet, but already waiting here.

RuntimeSidebar.title: Chat Runtime
RuntimeSidebar.subtitle: Mod-owned route selection for this chat only
